scene_title: Ministério da Verdade — corredor de arquivo
narrative_beat: Wide perspective of gigantic bureaucratic archive corridor with silhouetted archivists in infinite rows, central man feeding paper into flaming wall slot

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a gigantic bureaucratic archive corridor with a strong central vanishing point
subject.focal_point: a single man in his 40s in ochre and crimson suit at center, back turned, feeding a paper into a wall slot emitting orange fire
subject.secondary: Endless silhouetted archivists in P&B rows extending to infinity. Cold fluorescent strips.

environment.location: the archives of the Ministry of Truth

composition.foreground: central man and flame in rich ochre, crimson and orange
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white archive corridor and archivists

lighting.key_light: cold fluorescent overhead plus warm flame from the slot
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on central figure's shoulder

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: erasing the past to control the future
symbolism.secondary: the memory hole as devourer of history

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
